programme.title: The Family Next Door
programme.desc: Australian mystery drama. Detective Gillespie pays a visit to Isabelle as she has news about Pleasant Court but is also armed with the knowledge of an investigation into Isabelle - why is she still pursuing a case when she's on suspension? Meanwhile, Isabelle does her best to befriend Lulu, who seems to be struggling to manage her rambunctious daughter Elvis - when Lulu makes it clear that she does not want to be interviewed for her story, Isabelle turns her attention to Holly. Deploying some investigative charm, Isabelle uncovers a nasty backstory to Elvis's past that prompts her to visit the father at work unannounced and unwelcome - the visit has unwanted ramifications when Pete turns up on Lulu's doorstep demanding access to his daughter, and Isabelle learns that her prior misconduct is being referred to the police.

programme.title: The Family Next Door
programme.desc: Australian mystery drama. Jules and Isabelle reconnect as he wants answers - when she tells him she's in Pleasant Court pursuing a lead, he vents his frustrations as she is risking both their careers and, more importantly, damaging their relationship. Meanwhile, simmering tensions between Fran and Nigel begin to explode as Nigel is still refusing to seek treatment for his depression and stalling on both his thesis and parenting obligations - things come to a head when Rosie leaves the house unsupervised and has a near-miss accident involving Isabelle's car and her scooter. Isabelle uses some shrewd tactics to get a hold of confidential files from Fran, but the papers don't provide the answers she wants - she reluctantly agrees to return home with Jules, but their truce is short-lived. When Jules learns that Isabelle has used his work ID to access some confidential information, he leaves without her and she is left alone.

programme.title: The Family Next Door
programme.desc: Australian mystery drama. With her time in Pleasant Court running out, Isabelle returns to a strange clue - as Barb prepares for the Eureka council hearing, Isabelle has some questions for her. Despite the protests, the development is approved and Ange has a much-needed win - however, it's short-lived as Clive tells her that he still wants out of the deal. As Ange feels that her world is crumbling, Isabelle learns that Barb has gifted Essie and Ben the family home - she suggests they celebrate and she will babysit. Questioning Barb's motives for leaving Pleasant Court, Isabelle takes the opportunity to search their house - at the same time, Ange is snooping through hers determined to find the truth of her hidden agenda. As Ange discovers Isabelle's true identity, Isabelle makes a huge discovery...

programme.title: The Family Next Door
programme.desc: The final part of the Australian mystery drama. After a restless night, Isabelle is burdened with her discovery - now she has the truth, she must consider if she is prepared to destroy one family to heal another. Meanwhile, Pleasant Court prepares for a street party as an increasingly anxious Barb quietly tidies up her affairs, and Ange is also wrestling with the truth as she knows why Isabelle is at Pleasant Court - when she confronts her, Isabelle deflects by dropping a bombshell of her own. Fran retreats and reveals to Nigel how she's been feeling, but his reaction is unexpected - with the street party in ruins and each family affected by Isabelle's investigation, a broken Ange insists that everyone has lunch together. When they realise that Barb and Mia are missing, Isabelle is panicked - fearing history is repeating itself, she wrestles with the truth and eventually reveals what it was that brought her to Pleasant Court.

programme.desc: Comedy series providing an honest, uplifting and heart-warming portrayal of the lives of working-class teenagers from Liverpool while tackling issues with a refreshing humour. Ted is the envy of the school as he starts dating popular sixth-former Thomas - Ted finds Thomas's talk of their spiritual connection beguiling, and their electrifying romance is cemented when Thomas takes Ted to see the Gormley statues on Crosby Beach for the very first time. This is a side of Liverpool that Ted never knew existed and a way of looking at the world that captures his heart and imagination, but for all Thomas's talk of them being soulmates, Ted is left with a decision to make when it is revealed that his older lover is exploring ethical non-monogamy. Meanwhile, Mia-Louise is worried that Ziad might be gay as he doesn't want to have sex with her, Mo is still acting like a devout Muslim in the hope of getting closer with The Brimble, and Christopher and Aimee bond over their Romeo and Juliet scenes.

programme.desc: Comedy series about twenty-something British-Pakistani Muslim doctor Abdulla Khan. Abdulla is desperate for some answers and unfaltering in his desire to find a cure to his vampirism when he agrees to go on a date with Kathy at her favourite haunt - once there, however, the out-of-place young Muslim can't shake the feeling that he is being watched by the coven and by Shafi, who turns up with his beautiful fiancee Nahima to intervene as Muslims don't do boyfriend-girlfriend dates! Elsewhere, Bushra and Shafi arrange for a marriage counsellor to see Abdulla to set him straight, but the man that turns up is not who they expect him to be... When the 'Halal double date' turns sour, Abdulla is forced to take protective action which sees the hitherto receptive Kathy return to her terrifying former self - now on the run, Abdulla drops down at Amrita's door but finds that her relationship status might be a little different to what he expected.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: Reunion Part One: US reality series. The Salt Lake City Housewives bring an icy chill to New York to confront one another after the unpredictable third series. [S] S3 Ep15

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New Jersey
programme.desc: US reality series following the lavish lifestyle of New Jersey housewives and their families. Jennifer is left feeling defenceless and abandoned by those she considers her ride-or-dies, Teresa opens up to Gia about the overwhelming stress she's facing from Louie's ongoing legal battle, Jen Fessler is left wondering if her friendship with Rachel can recover, and Dolores plans a retreat for everyone to make amends as the group continues to unravel.

programme.title: New: Celebrity Catchphrase
programme.desc: Joe Swash, Joanna Page and Angellica Bell join Stephen Mulhern for Celebrity Catchphrase, trying to ‘say what they see’ and guess well-known phrases for their chance to win £50,000 for charity.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Graham Norton hosts as solicitor Sapna, work planner Ben, and custody officer Deborah take on the Wheel and some head-scratching puzzles to win a possible 50,000 pounds.

programme.title: The 1% Club
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered how clever you are? This is your chance to find out as comedy legend Lee Mack presents the ultimate leveller of a quiz show - it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at quizzes because the questions have nothing to do with remembering facts and are all about logic and common sense. This is the quiz that the whole family can play together - 100 contestants begin every show and try to make it to the end to answer a question that only one per cent of the country can get right and win up to 100,000 pounds.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Cheshire
programme.desc: Tensions between Seema and Sheena go from bad to worse as they tackle their issues head-to-head, while a cheap joke leaves Ampika buying forgiveness. Paige is excited to sparkle and shine at her exclusive diamond event - unfortunately, her cheeky invitation sparks offence, causing her truce with Rachel to come to an end.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Animated comedy about the trials and tribulations of family life. A little white lie by Peter about Chris having done his homework snowballs into far bigger ones that lead to Peter being worshipped as a god.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Animated comedy about the everyday trials and tribulations of family life. Peter and Lois become political opponents in their bid to become the new school board president.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Animated comedy about the everyday trials and tribulations of family life. Peter, who is concerned that the world is about to end because of Y2K, convinces the family into cancelling their New Year's Eve plans. After bombs destroy everything, the Griffins set off to a Twinkie factory in Natick.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated series about CIA agent Stan Smith. Stan and Roger experience life in each other's shoes after Stan is arrested for drink driving and is put under house arrest. After the excitement of a new life stales, they face each other's problems - Roger is under pressure at work and Stan yearns to be needed.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated series about family man Stan Smith, who works for the CIA. Stan goes to great lengths to compete against his rival, Chuck White, and become the new deacon of their church. programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: There is a celebration at Luxton and District because it is 50 years since they got their first motor bus. Blakey organises an exhibition to re-create the "good old days" before the Unions got hold of the busmen and made his life impossible.

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Drama series featuring Colin Dexter's enigmatic Chief Inspector. When a brutal murder disturbs the tranquillity of an ancient Oxford college, Morse discovers that he has unwittingly provided all the suspects with a watertight alibi.

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series about a pair of gardening enthusiasts-turned-amateur sleuths. Wellminster Cathedral is preparing for a royal visit and its Custos has asked Rosemary and Laura to restore the old monastery physic garden to mark the cathedral's millennium, but someone is not happy about the girls working on the herb garden. When the Custos' daughter Trish is found murdered there, Rosemary and Laura realise that they could be in serious danger and suspect that Trish's boyfriend Ryan who knows more than he is telling - could the mystery surrounding the cathedral dean's recent hit-and-run accident be connected to current events, and what secrets are this tight-knit community concealing? As Rosemary and Laura struggle to bring the herb garden back to life in time for the royal visit, a shocking discovery is made...

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series. Caroline Pargeter, the granddaughter of the famous botanist Edwin Pargeter, is selling her house and has asked Rosemary and Laura to reorganise a seed museum created by her late grandfather - when a mysterious South American is found dead in Caroline's back garden, it appears that there is more to Edwin's seeds than meets the eye. Rosemary consults a friend who works for the Royal Horticultural Society in Kew to help identify some pine seeds before they can fall into the wrong hands.

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series about a pair of sleuthing gardeners. When Neil Spicer, a former boyfriend of Rosemary's, invites her and Laura to his home in the hills behind Malaga in southern Spain to help create an Arabic garden, one of the local residents is then found dead and their mysterious landowner Luis Mendes is the chief suspect. As Neil declares his continuing love for Rosemary - who must also contend with Neil's jealous wife - Laura discovers clues in the history of the local aquifers. Someone has been blocking the mountainside water channels on which the new garden will rely - is the precious water the real reason behind the murder?

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. Miss Marple arrives at the luxurious Bertram's Hotel but soon discovers that there are dark secrets lurking below the highly polished veneer - when one of the maids is murdered, she tries to learn the truth before the murderer strikes again... however, the reality is far more sinister than even she is prepared for.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. When a body drops out of a plane and is discovered in a reservoir, Barnaby and Nelson find that the world of stunt pilots and aviation heroes hides many dark secrets. Are campaigners against the local airfield behind Bernard King's murder - or does it date back to a tragic story from the Second World War?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: 100th episode of the rural detective drama series. DCI John Barnaby and DS Charlie Nelson head off across the North Sea when the body of Midsomer resident Eric Calder is discovered in Copenhagen. The boss of Calder's Biscuit Factory has been murdered in the Danish capital, and Barnaby and Nelson join forces with two local female detectives - the abrasive but astute Birgitte Poulsen and the cool yet charming Anna Degn - in the hunt for the killer. In the course of the investigation they discover that Harry had more links to Copenhagen than just his famous golden clusters.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The unveiling of a newly-discovered novel by deceased Midsomer crime-writer George Summersbee at the Luxton Deeping Crime Festival is jeopardised when the manuscript is stolen and a woman is fatally electrocuted by a booby-trapped roulette wheel. Can new dad Barnaby untangle a web of jealousy and obsession to find the killer?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The world of organic baking begins to crumble after a series of incidents at the newly-revamped Larkton's Mill.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama series based on characters created by Ann Cleeves. DCI Vera Stanhope is on track to uncover an intriguing yet puzzling case when the body of a sickly young girl is found in a railway siding in the middle of nowhere - the girl could be anyone, but the investigation soon turns up twists and turns that makes Vera question who this girl actually was. As a vulnerable young person with a serious health condition, it appears as if her weakened state has allowed someone to take advantage of her and her family's dynamic changed when she wasn't truly part of the family. In a tale of intrigue, betrayal and blurred lines, Vera's investigation questions the meaning of family, care, accountability and eroding trust where care might have come at a cost.

programme.title: Joan
programme.desc: Drama series starring Sophie Turner as Joan Hannington, a notorious jewel thief in the 1980s. Joan is now aiming to provide a stable home for Kelly by outdoing her foster parents financially - she joins Boisie in stealing a Stubbs painting, but the plan goes awry when the owner's ex-husband unexpectedly appears. Angry about how Boisie handles it, Joan storms out with cash - when she then struggles to sell her diamonds to a fence called King, Social Services' impending visit forces Joan to reconcile with Boisie. Boisie lets her in and a new level of trust forms between them - in order to secure cash for her life with Kelly, Joan then proposes a heist to steal a ring that involves Albie as her accomplice. Boisie's jealousy adds tension, but when they succeed and Joan sells the ring to King, Boisie makes a grand proposal during a dinner party that causes the celebrations to become even more raucous - a hungover Joan is then visited by a social worker who has bad news about Kelly.

programme.title: Joan
programme.desc: Drama series starring Sophie Turner as Joan Hannington, a notorious jewel thief in the 1980s. Joan and Boisie buy an engagement ring while the police search for the missing Stubbs painting at Boisie's store - the police find nothing and a day with Kelly is enjoyable, but Joan is adamant that they have to get rid of the painting and go straight. As the police close in, Boisie struggles to find a buyer for the painting and turns to Albie for help - meanwhile, Joan is cleaning antiques at Boisie's shop and dreaming of running her own jewellery business while excelling in a gemmology course. Joan and Boisie get married, but Boisie's jealousy is piqued by Joan dancing with Albie - when Boisie then attempts to get his painting authenticated, his inside man Hugo Saxton is too scared to get involved. A desperate Boisie shares his plan to sell the painting with Joan - she's furious, but when Tom offers her an escape as an informant, she refuses and agrees to help Boisie after all.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The peace of Badger's Drift is disturbed when schoolteacher Connie Bishop screams in fright that she has an intruder. Later, at a meeting of the Frobisher Night committee, Connie clashes with trophy wife Zukie Richardson who wants to make the fundraising event grander with cash from her wealthy husband. When the body of a councillor who also opposed Zukie's plans is found in Connie's garden, the police are called, and DCI Tom Barnaby has another case of murder to deal with. Slimy womaniser Laurence Mann offers to change Connie's locks, but she wakes in the night to find him in the summerhouse with his throat cut. Not wishing to be alone in the cottage, Connie asks shy sculptor Justin Hooper to stay in her spare room - but he awakes to find her sleepwalking and trying to kiss him. When the police arrive, Connie confesses that she may have committed the murders in her sleep, saying she heard voices saying 'kill him'. But is she telling the truth?

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Debbie suspects Jo is a victim of domestic abuse and resolves to investigate for Sarah's sake. Donna has a panic attack, and Lisa refuses to go to work after Lexi's promotion.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. Jo's concern about an absentee schoolboy leads to a shocking discovery, and Blaketon suspects an inside job after a factory reports a break-in.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When drag queens sashay into A conservative village, they're soon ostracised when their charity event clashes with the local Annual Dominoes Competition.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Carson's Circus has rolled into town and Will, Geordie and the rest of the Grantchester family are making the trip to it - they delight in watching mind-bending illusions and death-defying stunts, but the very next morning dawns with Errol Macabre, one of the circus performers, being found dead having been shot with a crossbow that was used in a magic trick. Was this a tragic accident caused by a malfunctioning prop? When Geordie sees that the crossbow has been tampered with, he realises this was no such thing and that someone wanted Errol dead - with the circus closed and the rest of the performers having alibis for the time of the murder, who could have possibly done this?

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Will wants to grab a quiet moment with Geordie to tell him that he and Bonnie have decided to leave Grantchester, but any chance he might have had is thrown out the window when Geordie receives a call about a dead body at the River View Hotel - as the time for Sunday service approaches, Will and Bonnie enter the church but are stopped short on discovery of an abandoned baby inside. Upon inspecting the blanket the baby is wrapped in, Will and Bonnie see that it is marked River View Hotel and learn that a young woman had checked in there the night before and made a phone call to the halfway house - after Ernie reports that he witnessed a young girl wearing a school blazer enter the church that morning, Will and Geordie probe into the staff and pupils of the Fidelis School for Girls and secrets start to emerge that turn the entire investigation on its head. When Will later finds an inopportune moment to tell Geordie that he is leaving, his friend is stung by the news...

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The final episode of the detective drama series. Lewis and Hathaway are called in to investigate when an idyllic Oxford summer's day is shattered by a parcel bomb - the victim of the attack is eminent mathematician Adam Capstone, a genius in the field of knot theory. Adam was notorious for his numerous affairs with attractive young students, so could his wife have the motive to want him dead?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby decides to join a trip from Midsomer Parva to Brighton because he is suspicious about a deal to buy coastal land for holiday chalets by Causton's mayor Dave Hicks - he discovers that the land wanted by Hicks is prone to flooding from the sea. Also against the proposal is Lady Matilda William, a descendant of a French knight Sir Richard Guillaume, whose son Richard will be the last of the line because of brain damage sustained in an attack 20 years ago - in Brighton, some of the villagers go to the funfair. When Dalgleish takes a ride on the ghost train, he emerges from the tunnel beheaded - Barnaby learns about a proposal to build flood defences which would make Hicks' land rocket in value and that Dalgleish lent Hicks money to bribe councillors to agree. Back in Midsomer, Barnaby realises there could be a connection between Dalgleish's greedy desire for land and Lady Matilda's desire to preserve the Guillaume family line... but who is prepared to kill to protect Richard?

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Donald confronts Carl when Anna tells him she thinks he was behind their client taking his business to the Kings. Nicola wears an over-the-top outfit to the book reading.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Donald learns he needs a pacemaker and plots revenge on the Kings, while Donna struggles to suppress her feelings for Ross. Nicola's book reading turns into a disaster.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: As Liz anticipates a call from Harry, a devious Clarissa sets out to win him back. Prem inspires Dev to turn his life around and Tyrone plans a dream wedding for Molly.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Dev meets a famous Bollywood face and Liz tries to stay calm as Harry apologises for misleading her, but when Clarissa rubs salt in her wounds, she flies off the handle

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. Greengrass becomes the recipient of some stolen cigarettes, Jo receives some tragic news, and an ex-soldier brings wartime memories with him when he returns to Aidensfield.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. Nick discovers the complicated history behind a well-dressed woman and her romance with a member of the community, and Claude tries to help an Australian couple.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama series based on characters created by Ann Cleeves. DCI Vera Stanhope investigates when the body of the co-owner of a chip shop is found in his own freezer - a seemingly successful entrepreneur and dedicated family man, Vera uncovers secrets, lies and some unforgivable behaviour as she tries to unwrap the case. Once the investigation begins, it soon becomes apparent that our enigmatic entrepreneur has left behind debts, broken promises, ruined lives and seriously interfered in family business that was not his own - now Vera must find who is responsible for the this unsavoury chip shop assault and battery.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Geordie is still mourning Will's departure when Mrs C charges into the pub with reports of a gentleman breaking into the vicarage - Geordie leaps into action and heads straight inside the vicarage to confront the intruder. A tussle ensues between them before Geordie is confronted by the realisation that this man is no burglar - he's the new vicar. The man introduces himself as the Reverend Alphy Kottaram - as Alphy settles into life in Grantchester, his first order of business at the church is a funeral service for local landowner Albert Baron, who apparently took his own life - when the service is abruptly interrupted by the Walkers, a family warring with the Barons, a fight breaks out in the church. As the Walkers leave, Albert's son Harvey accuses the Walkers of murdering his father - as Alphy corrals the two families into the vicarage and Geordie arrives to investigate, an initially reluctant Alphy finds himself drawn into solving clues and uncovering buried secrets.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Alphy receives a mysterious letter in the post - this is the second time he's received post of its kind, but the meaning behind both letters entirely escapes him. Alphy doesn't have long to dwell on this because he has been invited to Marwood Manor for dinner and a party - Alphy plans to use this opportunity to drum up funds for the ailing church, but when Lady Marwood announces that it's time to play hide and seek, Alphy finds himself opening a cupboard while looking for a suitable hiding spot and is surprised to discover a dead body inside. The body is that of Dennis, the Marwoods' gardener who had apparently left the manor only a day before without a word - a blackmail letter is found on him, but it's not immediately clear whether the letter is addressed to Dennis or if he'd written it for someone else. As Alphy and Geordie investigate the murky world of the manor, they begin to uncover strange secrets and illicit desires amongst the residents and staff there.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Drama series following two detective constables in Manchester and written by BAFTA Award-winner Sally Wainwright. When DC Rachel Bailey is dumped, her best friend DC Janet Scott is there to pick up the pieces. Meanwhile, DCI Gill Murray takes Rachel, Janet and the team through their new murder case at work: a young Turkish woman has been killed in her home and her death made to look like suicide. Rachel throws herself into the investigation, soon discovering that the victim's husband was having an affair - she takes a risk when she questions the man's mistress, but has her high-stakes approach jeopardised the case, or will she get results? Rachel is also occupied with investigating her ex and is horrified to find that he is married with children - at the same time, Janet is contacted by the brother of a school friend who was abducted and murdered when they were still at primary school. He asks if she will reopen the case - and Janet agrees to take another look at the evidence.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Police drama following the personal and professional lives of two Manchester detectives. Things become even more complicated for Rachel when she reveals to her ex Nick that she is pregnant - and his unsympathetic response confirms her decision to have a termination. At work, the team face a gruesome case in which a mother of two has been brutally raped and left to bleed to death in the boot of her car. The team get a lucky break when CCTV footage reveals a man following the woman just before she disappeared - the same man who had been seen asking for a taxi to the Walden Estate. The police go to the estate to make house-to-house enquiries, and a sharp piece of detective work from Rachel leads to the arrest of teenager Luke Farrell. However, Luke's arrest sparks a series of events which leads to further tragedy, much to the horror of the team. Meanwhile, Janet steps up her investigation into her childhood friend Veronica's death and meets with an officer who investigated the murder.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about the dodgy dealings of a loveable rogue and his sidekick. Arthur has a plan to boost the membership of the Winchester Club with a series of variety nights, but he ends up in a spot of bother over a stolen karaoke machine.

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry Cole explores more UK rides and gives more tired bikes some much-needed attention in his workshop with the help of Allen Millyard - in this episode, Henry takes a glorious ride through the Cotswolds to savour its gorgeous roads, meets the young designers reviving Royal Enfield, tells the story of the Ducati Monster and has his riding technique assessed.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: When a Haul Road legend dies, Ray leads the trucker's son to scatter his ashes on Atigun. But the son's blunders on the Dalton could get them killed before they make it. Lisa gets her biggest break yet when she's assigned to push-truck a monster load to Prudhoe. Alex discovers Alaskan gold, but is later busted by the DOT for violations.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Last year, as Alaskan temperatures rose, flowing ice from the Yukon River nearly wiped out an entire village. Now, the DOT are racing to stop an overflow that could take out the Dalton and its truckers with it. As drivers race to rack up loads in the Dash for the Cash, they're forced to team up for safety.

programme.title: Martinator, voluntad de hierro
programme.desc: Escuchaba el rugido de los motores del Jarama desde su habitación y ahora pelea por ser campeón de MotoGP. Jorge Martín ha superado todos los límites de un deportista de élite para escalar la cima del motociclismo mundial.

programme.title: Ibiza Trail Maratón 2026
programme.desc: El Ibiza Trail Maratón es una prueba de referencia en el trail running a nivel balear, nacional e internacional.

programme.title: Póker FC

programme.title: Premier League
programme.desc: Máxima competitividad, respeto a la tradición, muchos de los mejores jugadores del planeta sobre el césped y ambientazo en las gradas de todos los estadios. Es la Premier League, el torneo de la regularidad del fútbol inglés. El Liverpool defiende corona.

programme.title: Premier League Features
programme.desc: Nos ponemos al día con Juan Mata en Australia, donde la exestrella de la Premier League juega ahora con el Western Sydney Wanderers. El español reflexiona sobre sus memorables años en Inglaterra con el Chelsea y el Manchester United.

programme.title: Premier League

programme.title: Premier Corner by Guiness 0,0
programme.desc: Entrevista a Mikel Arteta, técnico del Arsenal que ha vuelto a ilusionar a la afición 'gunner' y promete hacer grandes cosas en el conjunto del norte de Londres.

programme.title: El Fenómeno
programme.desc: El Fenómeno era el niño prodigio que lo tenía todo. Campeón del Mundo a los 17 años. Mejor jugador del año a los 20. Dos veces récord mundial de un traspaso a los 21. Impresionantes goles allá donde jugó. Y entonces, todo le fue brutalmente arrebatado.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Setelah menyerap Chi, Pahlawan mistis, dari Empat Rasi Bintang, empat anak panda meminta Master Naga untuk mengajari mereka Kung Fu.

programme.title: Classic Cartoon
programme.desc: Classic Cartoon adalah serial kartun anak - anak yang di dalamnya terdapat serial kartun Casper dan teman - temannya.

programme.title: Abominable And The Invisible City
programme.desc: Serial Animasi yang melanjutkan kisah petualangan Yi Jin dan Peng dari film 'Abominable'. Mereka sekarang harus melindungi makhluk ajaib bernama Everest dan dunia tak kasat mata dari orang orang yang ingin mengeksploitasinya.

programme.title: Kring Kring Ada Cerita
programme.desc: Sebuah Program yang berisikan pesan kebaikan yang disampaikan melalui dongeng, lagu dan drama singkat yang dibawakan oleh anak - anak.

programme.title: Si Unyil
programme.desc: Serial kartun produksi anak negeri yang telah dibuat ulang agar lebih menarik.

programme.title: Balita
programme.desc: Lagu Anak Indonesia BaLiTa menyajikan animasi lagu anak Indonesia yang lucu, video belajar membaca alfabet, berhitung dan menyanyi ditemani oleh trio Baba Lili Tata.

programme.title: Rasyah The Wonder Kid
programme.desc: Pekerjaan ayah Rasyah membuat mereka sering berpindah tempat. Di Makasar Rasyah mendapatkan satu teman yang sangat baik. Dilema dimulai saat Rasyah akan meninggalkan teman terbaiknya itu.

programme.title: Ricis The Adventure
programme.desc: Ricis bersama timnya menemukan ponsel misterius dan tersedot ke layar ponsel. Ternyata mereka diseret ke portal yang mengirim mereka ke Socidia City, kota metaverse tempat semua aktivitas jejaring sosial di dunia nyata.

programme.title: Dragons
programme.desc: Menceritakan seorang Putra seorang ketua Viking berteman dengan musuh mereka, seekor naga. Kisah ini berfokus pada kejadian terjadi di desa Berk Viking, di mana peternakan penduduk setempat kerap dicuri & diserang oleh seekor naga

programme.title: Little Charmers
programme.desc: Di tanah ajaib Charmville, Charmer-in-training Hazel dan sahabatnya, Posie dan Lavender, masih terbiasa dengan kekuatan mereka. Hazel yang tak kenal takut, memimpin kelompok dalam petualangan yang dirancang kemampuan magis mereka.

programme.title: Menggapai Mimpi
programme.desc: Program features tentang anak - anak sekolah yang berjuang dalam menggapai mimpi. Baik dalam dunia pendidikan formal maupun non formal mereka yang tetap semangat dalam meraih cita - citanya.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Berlatar 1.300 tahun setelah How to Train Your Dragon, dimana naga telah lama dianggap sebagai legenda. Ceritanya berpusat pada sekelompok remaja yang menemukan celah di Bumi akibat komet yang membuka dunia bawah tanah penuh naga

programme.title: Bermain & Bergembira
programme.desc: Bermain & Bergembira bersama anak-anak aktif, cerdas dan kreatif.

programme.title: Petualangan Cipung & Monstar

programme.title: Madam Rose

programme.title: Horror Banget
programme.desc: Cak Lontong dan anak indigo Naomi Angelia Sea akan membahas dan membedah hal-hal horor dengan tema-tema yang seru. Kita akan buktikan bersama apakah itu nyata atau hanya gosip saja.

programme.title: Eyang Putri
programme.desc: Tragedi aneh terjadi di rumah EYANG SRI, bahkan Gendis, cucu Eyang mendapati sebuah teror klenik diluar nalar yang mengancam nyawa mereka.

programme.title: Dapil Komeng
programme.desc: Sketsa Komedi yang menceritakan kelucuan Komeng dalam mewujudkan mimpinya dengan cara masuk ke lemari rahasia yang akan membawanya kemana saja dan bertemu siapa saja yang dia inginkan

programme.title: Bisik Hati Lara
programme.desc: LARA sebagai anak sulung, tak punya pilihan selain harus mencari pekerjaan tambahan, demi adik satu- satunya, LENA, bisa melanjutkan SMA nya sampai lulus, sembari memastikan terapi pengobatan Ibu.

programme.title: Brata S2
programme.desc: Pembunuhan brutal terjadi di ATM kampung Sukadamai. Roni harus memimpin penyelidikan karena Brata dipindahkan ke bagian arsip. Sukadamai membawa Brata kembali ke mimpi buruk di masa lalu.

programme.title: Angling Dharma S2
programme.desc: Perpecahan terjadi ketika Kerajaan Malwapati yang dipimpin oleh Prabu Angling Dharma disulut oleh perseteruan dengan Syudawirat untuk memperebutkan.

programme.title: Trip Among Rans
programme.desc: Pergi berlibur ditengah masa PSBB membuat Raffi dan nagita menjadi super heboh dalam mempersiapkan segala kebutuhan liburannya demi mendapatkan liburan yang aman dan tetap nyaman

programme.title: Negeri 5 Menara
programme.desc: Negeri 5 Menara series bercerita tentang Alif, pemuda minangkabau memiliki cita-cita tinggi. Ia ingin sekolah di ITB & menjadi sosok seperti idolanya, B.J. Habibie. Sayangnya keinginan Alif tidak mendapat respon baik dari ibunya.

programme.title: Isyarat
programme.desc: Angkie dilahirkan sebagai gadis yang cantik dan normal. Namun, pada usia 10 tahun tiba-tiba pendengarannya berkurang secara drastis. Dokter memvonisnya kehilangan pendengaran selamanya.

programme.title: Akhir Kisah Si Doel
programme.desc: Kepulangan Sarah bersama Dul ke Jakarta, disambut bahagia oleh keluarga Doel. Namun hal tersebut juga membuat Zaenab, Sarahdan Doel dihadapkan pada dilemma untuk menentukan pilihan.

programme.title: CLBK The Series
programme.desc: Mini series yang menceritakan suka dan duka mencari pasangan melalui kencan buta.

programme.title: Mr Bean Animation
programme.desc: Mr. Bean laki-laki yang mempunyai sikap sedikit kekanak-kanakan yang berusaha bertahan hidup di kota London dan sangat kompetititf. Dalam series animasi, ia digambarkan lebih beruntung dan kompeten dari versi live actionya.

programme.title: Apose Boss Baru S3
programme.desc: Menceritakan tentang usaha Andre kembali kepada Surya. Selain Andre, Dicky juga kehilangan jabatannya sebagai boss karena skandalnya ketahuan. Karena skandal Dicky, posisi CEO kini diganti dengan Bos Baru yaitu Ayu Ting-Ting.

programme.title: Kartu Pos Wini
programme.desc: Ruth berhasil memenuhi salah satu obsesinya bekerja di Kantor Pos. Dia juga menjadi relawan yang mendampingi pasien kanker anak bernama Wini Edenia. Suatu hari, Wini ingin mengirimkan kartu pos untuk Tuhan yang beralamat surga.

programme.title: Waktunya Srimulat Bercyanda

programme.title: LDR
programme.desc: Saat mendadak ditinggal pergi oleh kekasihnya keluar negeri, Ella terpaksa harus LDR. Berbagai cobaan mulai menerpa Ella, hingga perlawanan batin dalam diri Ella untuk tidak meneruskan hubungan ini.

programme.title: Cerita Dokter Cinta
programme.desc: Kisah Dokter Obgyn Ryan, Lana , Tiara, Jarwo, Leon, Acho, Anissa dalam membantu persalinan pasien dan mengatasi persoalan cinta di antara mereka yang penuh konflik.

programme.title: Rintik Terakhir
programme.desc: Bercerita tentang Karang Samudra Daneswara yang terbangun dari koma dan menemukan dirinya dikendalikan oleh kepribadian baru bernama Arutala. Akibatnya, hubungan Karang dengan kekasihnya, Launa dan keluarganya menjadi rumit.

programme.title: Dapuk
programme.desc: Sketsa Komedi Oleh Denny Caknan, Cak Percil dan Abah Kirun. Dalam Lakon Keseharian. Yang Memberikan Solusi Penuh Masalah Dibalut Dengan Komedi Jawa Yang Kental.

programme.title: Dilan 1991 Extended
programme.desc: 22 Desember 1990, Dilan dan Milea resmi berpacaran. Di tengah kebahagiaan mereka Dilan terancam dipecat dari sekolah akibat perkelahian dengan Anhar. Dilan juga semakin sering berkelahi. Milea khawatir dengan masa depan Dilan.

programme.title: Vidi-O-Call
programme.desc: Video Call, salah satu cara Vidi terus berkomunikasi dengan para sahabatnya selama masa pandemi. Santai namun mendalam, membeberkan segala isu dan fakta, termasuk hal-hal sensitif dari sahabat Vidi

programme.title: Digimon Adventure
programme.desc: Tujuh orang anak pergi ke perkemahan musim panas, Hal terakhir yang mereka harapkan adalah salju turun di bulan Juli. Dalam kebingungan itu, mereka masing-masing menerima perangkat aneh yang memindahkan mereka ke dunia lain.

programme.title: Pocoyo
programme.desc: Pocoyo menjelajahi dunianya yang penuh warna dengan kegembiraan dan keingintahuan yang tak terbatas. Di mana pocoyo belajar tentang persahabatan, kejujuran, dan mengatasi tantangan dengan imajinasi dan kecerdasannya.

programme.title: Shimajiro 2D
programme.desc: Shimajiro akan menghibur dan mendidik anak anda dengan lagu anak-anak yang kami nyanyikan bersama dan membantu mereka mempelajari keterampilan yang mereka butuhkan untuk masa depan.

programme.title: Go Jetter
programme.desc: Go Jetters adalah serial animasi petualangan dan edukasi yang mengikuti empat pahlawan super muda, Xuli, Kyan, Lars, dan Foz, yang dipimpin oleh mentor disko mereka yang unik, Ubercorn. mereka menjelajah dunia.

programme.title: Morphle
programme.desc: Little Mila mengubah waktu bermain menjadi serangkaian petualangan yang menyenangkan dan mendidik dengan hewan peliharaan ajaibnya. morphle. yang bisa berubah menjadi apa pun yang diimpikannya!

programme.title: Titipo Titipo
programme.desc: Titipo memperluas pengalamannya di dunia yang lebih besar berteman dengan genie, diesel, dan kereta kecil lainnya. Akankah Titipo mencapai mimpinya menjadi kereta terbaik? Saksikan perjalanan titipo dan teman-teman kereta kecil.

programme.title: Pororo Meets Katuri
programme.desc: Kumpulan episode terbaik dari pororo si penguin kecil dan katuri. menampilkan momen-momen edukatif tentang kerja sama tim dan eksplorasi alam yang dikemas secara menarik untuk anak-anak.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Kenalan yuk sama Bing, kelinci kecil yang lucu dan penuh rasa ingin tahu! bersama teman dewasa kesayangannya, Flop, bing selalu menemukan hal-hal baru yang seru setiap hari.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey Adalah Serial Animasi Asal Australia Yang Mengikuti Petualangan Sehari-Hari Seekor Anak Anjing Ras Blue Heeler Berusia Enam Tahun Bernama Bluey

programme.title: Tian Tian
programme.desc: Sebuah keluarga sederhana dari kota besar memutuskan untuk meninggalkan gemerlap perkotaan dan kembali ke desa demi anak mereka yang takut pergi ke sekolah. Di desa, mereka berinteraksi dengan teman, tetangga dan hewan-hewan.

programme.title: Abang L The Explorer
programme.desc: Dimana abang L akan mengajak penonton bermain sekaligus belajar hal-hal seusia abang l dan berbeda disetiap episodenya. tingkah lucu, gemas dan keaktifan abang l akan menjadi warna yang menghidupi program ini.

programme.title: Shuke And Beita
programme.desc: Dua tikus, Shuke dan Beta, menjadi mitra dan memulai petualangan yang menakjubkan. mereka membantu hewan lain dengan helikopter dan tank mereka dan menerima cinta dan persahabatan sepanjang perjalanan mereka.

programme.title: Katuri Meets Boonie
programme.desc: Katuri adalah sebuah acara menarik tentang empat anak burung pegar yang tumbuh di hutan alami di bawah perawatan dan kasih sayang lembut ibu Flora.

programme.title: Bioskop Keluarga Indonesia: Bis Kecil Di Dunia Ajaib
programme.desc: Bioskop Keluarga Indonesia menyajikan film animasi mendidik penuh pesan moral untuk seluruh anggota keluarga. Program ini menjadi tontonan seru sekaligus momen kebersamaan yang berharga bagi keluarga di rumah.

programme.title: Pokemon Season 27 Horizon S2
programme.desc: Liko, Roy, dan Dot mengikuti pelatihan Tera di Akademi Naranja, menghadapi Gym Leader dan ancaman Explorers. Meski data Terapagos dicuri, mereka berhasil menyelesaikan turnamen dan mengasah kekuatan Terastal sebelum lulus.

programme.title: Keluarga Somat
programme.desc: Keluarga Somat menceritakan bahwa kita hidup harus saling berdampingan dan membantu satu sama lain sebagai masyarakat maupun pelajar.

programme.title: Plentis Kentus
programme.desc: Plentis dan Kentus adalah dua sahabat karib yang masih duduk di bangku sekolah dasar. keduanya memiliki mimpi besar untuk menjadi penyanyi terkenal. mereka suka bernyanyi, menciptakan lagu, dan tampil di berbagai acara.

programme.title: Bedu Dan Adul
programme.desc: Bedu dan Adul adalah sebuah serial film animasi 3D tentang petualangan anak-anak di kawasan pinggiran jakarta yang multikultural.

programme.title: Madun
programme.desc: Serial Madun menceritakan perjalanan hidup madun 16 tahun dalam memperjuangkan cita-citanya menjadi pesepakbola.

programme.title: Digimon Adventure
programme.desc: Tujuh orang anak pergi ke perkemahan musim panas, Hal terakhir yang mereka harapkan adalah salju turun di bulan Juli. Dalam kebingungan itu, mereka masing-masing menerima perangkat aneh yang memindahkan mereka ke dunia lain.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 2
द हंगर गेम्स: मॉकिंगजे, पार्ट 2
தி ஹங்கர் கேம்ஸ்: மாக்கிங்ஜே, பார்ட் 2
ది హంగర్ గేమ్స్: మోకింగ్‌జయ్, పార్ట్ 2
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen realises that she is no longer fighting for survival. So, she sets out to assassinate the tyrannical President Snow and liberate the people of Panem.
कैटनीस एवरडीन को एहसास होता है कि अब वह ज़िंदा रहने के लिए नहीं लड़ रही है। इसलिए, वह अत्याचारी राष्ट्रपति स्नो की हत्या करके पैनम के लोगों को आज़ाद कराने की ठान लेती है।
உயிர்வாழ்வதற்காக போராடவில்லை என்பதை கட்னிஸ், ஜனாதிபதி ஸ்னோவை படுகொலை செய்து பனேம் மக்களை விடுவிக்க முடிவெடுக்கிறார்.
కాట్నిస్ ఎవర్‌డీన్, నిరంకుశ అధ్యక్షుడు స్నోను హత్య చేసి, పనేమ్ ప్రజలను విముక్తి చేయడానికి బయలుదేరుతుంది.

programme.title: Yashraj Mukhate; The Love Laugh Live Show
द लव लाफ लिव शो
தி லவ் லாஃப் லைவ் ஷோ
ద లవ్ లాఫ్ లైవ్ షో
द लव्ह लाफ लाईव्ह शो
programme.desc: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives.
प्रस्तुतकर्ता प्रमुख हस्तियों को आमंत्रित करते हैं और उनके व्यक्तिगत और व्यावसायिक जीवन के बारे में खुलकर बातचीत करते हैं।
முக்கிய பிரமுகர்கள் அவர்களின் தனிப்பட்ட மற்றும் தொழில் வாழ்க்கையைப் பற்றி தொகுப்பாளருடன் பகிர்ந்து கொள்கிறார்கள்.
వ్యాఖ్యాత ప్రముఖ వ్యక్తులను ఆహ్వానించి, వారి వ్యక్తిగత, వృత్తిపరమైన జీవితాల గురించి నిష్కపటమైన సంభాషణలలో పాల్గొంటారు.

programme.title: Final Score
फाइनल स्कोर
ஃபைனல் ஸ்கோர்
ఫైనల్ స్కోర్
फायनल स्कोअर
programme.desc: When two terrorists kidnap former soldier Michael Knox's niece, he employs all of his skills to rescue her and possibly foil a plan of mass destruction as well.
दो आतंकवादी पूर्व सैनिक माइकल की भतीजी का अपहरण करते हैं, तब वह अपने हर तरह के हुनर का उपयोग करके उनकी योजना को विफल करके लड़की को बचाने की कोशिश करता है।
இரு பயங்கரவாதிகள் மைக்கேல் நாக்ஸின் மருமகளை கடத்தும்போது, ​​அவர் அவளை மீட்க தனது அனைத்து திறமைகளையும் பயன்படுத்துகிறார்.
ఒక మాజీ సైనికుడు మైఖేల్, ఇద్దరు తీవ్రవాదులు చేసిన విధ్వంస ప్రణాళికను విఫలం చేసి, వారి నుండి తన మేనకోడలిని కాపాడుకుంటాడు.
2 अतिरेक्यांनी एका माजी सैनिकाच्या पुतणीचे अपहरण केल्यावर तो हुशारीने तिला वाचवून त्यांच्या योजनेत अडथळे आणण्याचे ठरवतो.

programme.title: Backtrace
बैकट्रेस
பேக்ட்ரேஸ்
బ్యాక్‌ట్రేస్
programme.desc: A thief suffers from amnesia after committing a bank heist and is imprisoned. Seven years later, he is injected with a drug that restores his memory so that he may recover the stolen money.
एक चोर बैंक डकैती करने के बाद भूलने की बीमारी से पीड़ित होता है और उसे जेल हो जाती है। सात साल बाद, उसे एक ऐसी दवा दी जाती है जिससे उसकी याददाश्त वापस आ जाती है ताकि वह चोरी की गई रकम वापस पा सके।
வங்கி கொள்ளைக்கு பின் அம்மீஷியாவால் பாதிக்கப்படும் ஒரு திருடன், பணத்தை மீட்க அவனுக்கு ஞாபகம் வர மருந்தை எடுதுகொள்கிறான்.
బ్యాంకు దోపిడీతో తర్వాత గతం మరచి ఏడేళ్లు జైలుపాలైన ఒక దొంగ, తన గతాన్ని గుర్తు చేసుకోవడానికి ప్రత్యేక మందును ఇవ్వబడతాడు.

programme.title: Escape Plan 2: Hades
एस्केप प्लैन 2: हेड्स
எஸ்கேப் ப்ளான் 2: ஹேட்ஸ்
ఎస్కేప్ ప్లాన్ 2: హేడిస్
एस्केप प्लॅन 2: हेड्स
programme.desc: Security expert Ray Breslin forms a team of skilled personnel after escaping 'The Tomb'. However, when one of his colleagues goes missing, Breslin is forced to revisit the group that imprisoned him.
सुरक्षा विशेषज्ञ रे ब्रेस्लिन, 'द टॉम्ब' से भागने के बाद कुशल कर्मियों की टीम बनाता है। हालाँकि, उनका एक साथी लापता हो जाता है, तब ब्रेस्लिन को उस समूह से फिर से मिलना पड़ता है जिसने उसे कैद किया था।
பாதுகாப்பு நிபுணர் ரே பிரெஸ்லின்,சக ஊழியர் காணாமல் போனதால், கடந்த காலத்தை மீண்டும் நினைக்க வேண்டிய கட்டாயம் ஏற்படுகிறது.
సమాధి నుండి బయటపడ్డ బ్రెస్లిన్ నిపుణులైన భద్రతా సిబ్బందిని ఏర్పాటు చేసుకుంటాడు. కానీ అందులో ఒకరు కనిపించకుండా పోతారు.

programme.title: In the Name of the King: The Last Mission
इन द नेम ऑफ द किंग 3
இன் தி நேம் ஆஃப் தி கிங் III
ఇన్ ది నేమ్ ఆఫ్ ది కింగ్: ది లాస్ట్ మిషన్
इन द नेम ऑफ द किंग: द लास्ट मिशन
programme.desc: An assassin accepts one final job of abducting the daughters of a royal family. His life turns upside down when he is transported to the Middle Ages to fight an evil king and his dragon.
एक हत्यारा शाही परिवार की बेटियों का अपहरण करने का अपना आखिरी काम स्वीकार करता है। उसकी जिंदगी तब उलट-पुलट हो जाती है जब उसे मध्य युग में एक दुष्ट राजा और उसके अजगर से लड़ने के लिए भेज दिया जाता है।
அரச குடும்ப மகள்களை கடத்தும் செல்லும் கொலையாளி தீய ராஜா-டிராகனுடன் சண்டையிட இடைக்காலத்திற்கு செல்லும் போது தலைகீழாகிறது.
రాజకుటుంబంలోని కుమార్తెలను అపహరించిన కిరాయి హంతకుడు మధ్యయుగంలోకి రవాణా చేయబడి, ఒక దుష్ట రాజుతో పోరాడవలసి వస్తుంది.

programme.title: Modern Times
मॉडर्न टाइम्स
மாடர்ன் டைம்ஸ்
మోడరన్ టైమ్స్
मॉडर्न टाईम्स
programme.desc: A factory production line worker is thrown out on the street for his manic behaviour. He then meets a young, homeless girl, who is recently orphaned, and tries to build a home with her.
अपने व्यवहार के कारण एक फैक्ट्री प्रोडक्शन लाइन से निकाले गए एक वर्कर की मुलाकात, एक अनाथ युवा बेघर लड़की से होती है जिसके साथ वह घर बनाने की कोशिश करता है।
ஒரு தொழிற்சாலை உற்பத்தித் தொழிலாளி அனாதையான ஒரு இளம், வீடற்ற பெண்ணைச் சந்தித்து, அவளுடன் ஒரு வீடு கட்ட முயற்சிக்கிறார்.
ఉద్యోగం నుండి తొలగించబడిన ఒక ఫ్యాక్టరీ కార్మికుడు ఒక నిరాశ్రయురాలైన అమ్మాయితో ఇల్లు కట్టుకోవడానికి ప్రయత్నిస్తాడు.

programme.title: The Lost City
द लॉस्ट सिटी
தி லாஸ்ட் சிட்டி
ది లాస్ట్ సిటీ
द लॉस्ट सिटी
programme.desc: Loretta Sage, a novelist, faces real-life peril when abducted by a billionaire.
जहां लोरेटा सेज के उपन्यास प्राचीन मकबरों और साहसिक कारनामों से भरे होते हैं। वहीं एक सनकी अरबपति के एक पौराणिक खोए हुए शहर का पता लगाने के लिए उनका अपहरण कर लिया जाता है।
ஒரு புகழ்பெற்ற தொலைந்து போன நகரத்தைக் கண்டுபிடிக்க சாகச நாவலாசிரியர் லோரெட்டா சேஜ் ஒரு கோடீஸ்வரரால் கடத்தப்படுகிறார்.
లోరెట్టా సేజ్ నవలలు పురాతన సమాధులు,సాహసోపేతమైన సాహసాలతో నిండి ఉన్నాయి,కానీ ఆమె నిజ జీవితంలో వాటికి సిద్ధంగా ఉందని కాదు.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
मिशन: इम्पॉसिबल
மிஷன்: இம்பாசிபிள்
మిషన్: ఇంపాజిబుల్
मिशन: इम्पॉसिबल
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt, an elite intelligence agent, is branded a traitor following a disastrous mission in Prague. He recruits a team of operatives to help him retrieve a computer disk that can clear his name.
एक कुशल खुफिया एजेंट ईथन हंट, प्रेग में एक विनाशकारी मिशन के बाद देशद्रोही करार दिया जाता है। बेगुनाही साबित करने हेतु एक कंप्यूटर डिस्क हासिल करने में मदद पाने के लिए वह एक ऑपरेटिव टीम बनाता है।
ஒரு புலனாய்வு முகவரான ஈதன் ஹன்ட், பிராகாவில் ஒரு பேரழிவு தரும் பணியைத் தொடர்ந்து துரோகி என்று முத்திரை குத்தப்படுகிறார்.
అమెరికా స్పెషల్ ఏజెంట్, ఈథన్ హంట్ తన టీమ్‌ని చంపాడనే అభియోగంపై నింద రూపుమాపి, అసలు దొంగను పట్టుకోవడానికి పోరాడతాడు.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
रैम्बो: फर्स्ट ब्लड पार्ट 2
ராம்போ: ஃபர்ஸ்ட் ப்ளட் பார்ட் II
రాంబో: ఫస్ట్ బ్లడ్ పార్ట్ 2
programme.desc: John Rambo is offered the chance to cut short his prison tenure by going on a secret mission for the US government deep into the jungles of Vietnam and locating American POWs.
जॉन रेम्बो को अमेरिकी सरकार के लिए वियतनाम के जंगलों में गुप्त मिशन पर जाकर अमेरिकी युद्धबंदियों का पता लगाने के लिए अपनी जेल की अवधि कम करने का मौका दिया जाता है।
வியட்நாமின் காடுகளுக்குள் சென்று அமெரிக்க போர்க் கைதிகளைக் கண்டறிந்து தனது சிறை காலத்தை குறைக்கும் வாய்ப்பை பெறும் ஜான்.
వియత్నాం అడవుల్లో రహస్య మిషన్‌కి వెళ్లి అమెరికన్ యుద్ధ ఖైదీలను గుర్తించడంతో రాంబో తన జైలు శిక్షను తగ్గించుకోగలుగుతాడు.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
शर्लॉक होम्स
ஷெர்லாக் ஹோம்ஸ்
షెర్లాక్ హోమ్స్
शेरलॉक होम्स
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Dr Watson send Lord Henry Blackwood, a serial killer, to the gallows. However, they are shocked to learn that he is back from the dead and pursue him again.
शर्लक होम्स और डॉ. वॉटसन एक सीरियल किलर लॉर्ड हेनरी ब्लैकवुड को फाँसी पर चढ़ा देते हैं। हालाँकि, उन्हें यह जानकर सदमा लगता है कि वह वापस जिंदा होकर उनका पीछा करता है।
லார்ட் ஹென்றியை தூக்கு மேடைக்கு அனுப்பிய ஷெர்லாக் ஹோம்ஸும் டாக்டர் வாட்சனும் அவன் உயிர்தெழுந்தபோது அவனை பின்தொடர்ந்தனர்.
షెర్లాక్ హోమ్స్ మరియు డాక్టర్ వాట్సన్ మరణం నుండి తిరిగి వచ్చిన లార్డ్ హెన్రీ బ్లాక్‌వుడ్‌ను వెంబడిస్తారు.

programme.title: Rush Hour 2
रश आर 2
ரஷ் ஹவர் 2
రష్ అవర్ 2
रश आवर 2
programme.desc: Detective James Carter and Chief Inspector Lee return to action after a bomb explosion at the US Embassy in Hong Kong.
हांगकांग में अमेरिकी दूतावास में बम विस्फोट के बाद जासूस जेम्स कार्टर और मुख्य निरीक्षक ली कार्रवाई पर लौटते हैं।
ஹாங்காங்கில் உள்ள அமெரிக்க தூதரகத்தில் வெடிகுண்டு வெடித்த பிறகு மீண்டும் நடவடிக்கைக்கு திரும்பும் கார்ட்டர் மற்றும் லீ.
డిటెక్టివ్ కార్టర్, ఇన్‌స్పెక్టర్ లీ హాంకాంగ్‌లోని అమెరికా రాయబార కార్యాలయంలో జరిగిన బాంబు పేలుడును దర్యాప్తు చేస్తారు.

programme.title: Piranha 3DD
पिरान्हा 3डी
பிரானா 3டி‌டி
పిరాన్హా 3డిడి
programme.desc: The bloodthirsty piranhas head towards a local water park. Amidst the fun-seeking horde at the park are friends Maddy, Barry and Kyle who decide to take on the man-eating creatures.
खून के प्यासे पिरान्हा एक स्थानीय वाटर पार्क की ओर बढ़ते हैं। पार्क में मौज-मस्ती की तलाश में जुटी भीड़ के बीच दोस्त मैडी, बैरी और काइल, आदमखोर जीवों से लड़ने का फैसला करते हैं।
ஒரு நீர் பூங்கா நோக்கி செல்லும் தீய பிரன்ஹாக்களை தடுக்க முயலும் அங்கு வேடிக்கை-தேடும் மேடி, பாரி மற்றும் கைல்.
ముగ్గురు స్నేహితులు మ్యాడీ, బారీ, కైల్‌లు స్థానిక వాటర్ పార్క్ వైపు వస్తున్న రక్తపిపాసి పిరాన్హాలను చంపాలనుకుంటారు.

programme.title: Maximum Conviction
मॅक्सिमम कन्विक्शन
programme.desc: This is Film - Thriller Category

programme.title: Blue Beetle
ब्लू बीटल
ப்ளூ பீட்டல்
బ్లూ బీటిల్
programme.desc: An ancient alien relic chooses a college graduate to be its symbiotic host. As a result, the young man finds himself in possession of a suit with incredible powers.
एक प्राचीन एलियन अवशेष एक कॉलेज ग्रेजुएट को अपना सहजीवी मेज़बान चुनता है। नतीजतन, उस युवक को अविश्वसनीय शक्तियों वाला एक सूट मिल जाता है।
ஒரு அன்னிய நினைவுச்சின்னம் அதன் கூட்டாளியாக தேர்வு செய்த ஒரு கல்லூரி பட்டதாரி அபூர்வ சக்திகளை கொண்ட உடையை பெறுகிறான்.
స్కారాబ్ వద్ద అతీత శక్తులు పొందిన జామీ రేయెస్, దుర్మార్గపు ఉద్దేశాలు కలిగిన వ్యాపారవేత విక్టోరియా కోర్డ్‌తో పోరాడతాడు.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie
द लेगो मूवी
த லெகோ மூவி
ది లెగో మూవీ
programme.desc: Emmet, an ordinary individual prophesied to be the Special, is entrusted with the responsibility of saving the Lego world from the cruel ways of Lord Business.
एक साधारण व्यक्ति एम्मेट जिसके बारे में भविष्यवाणी की गई थी कि वह विशेष होगा, उसे लेगो वर्ल्ड को लॉर्ड बिज़नेस के क्रूर तरीकों से बचाने की जिम्मेदारी सौंपी जाती है।
லெகோ உலகத்தை லார்ட் பிசினஸின் கொடூரமான வழிகளில் இருந்து காப்பாற்ற வேண்டிய ஸ்பெஷல் என்று முன்னறிவிக்கப்பட்ட எம்மெட்.
ఒక సాధారణ వ్యక్తి ఎమ్మెట్ కు లార్డ్ బిజినెస్ క్రూరమైన మార్గాల నుండి లెగో ప్రపంచాన్ని రక్షించే బాధ్యతతో అప్పగిస్తారు.

programme.title: Gun
रामा बनबास कहानी सेशा
கன்
గన్
गन
programme.desc: Gemini said Angel and Rich trade firearms after Angel's release from jail. However, chaos erupts when they storm a lounge and slay a munitions merchant.
जेमिनी का कहना है, कि जेल से एंजल की रिहाई के बाद एंजल और रिच, हथियारों का लेन-देन करते हैं। हालाँकि, जब वे एक लाउंज में घुसकर हथियारों के एक व्यापारी को मार देते हैं तब अफरा-तफरी मच जाती है।
விடுவிக்கப்பட்ட ஏஞ்சல், ரிச்சுடன் துப்பாக்கிகளைப் பரிமாறிக்கொண்டு ஒரு ஆயுத வியாபாரியைக் கொன்றதால் குழப்பம் ஏற்பட்டது.
ఏంజెల్ జైలు నుండి విడుదలయ్యాక ఏంజెల్, రిచ్ లు ఆయుధాల వ్యాపారం చేస్తారని జెమిని చెప్పగా, వారు ఆయుధాల వ్యాపారిని చంపుతారు.

programme.title: The Gold Rush
द गोल्ड रश
த கோல்ட் ரஷ்
ది గోల్డ్ రష్
द गोल्ड रश
programme.desc: During the Klondike Gold Rush, a lone prospector goes through a series of misfortunes, including a blizzard and starvation. However, he finds love even in the stormy Alaska.
क्लोंडाइक गोल्ड रश के दौरान, एक अकेला खोजकर्ता बर्फ़ीले तूफ़ान और भुखमरी सहित कई दुर्भाग्यों से गुज़रता है। हालाँकि, उसे तूफ़ानी अलास्का में भी प्यार मिल जाता है।
க்ளோண்டிக் தங்க வேட்டையில் பனிப்புயல்,பட்டினி போன்ற துன்பங்களை சந்திக்கும் ஆய்வாளர், அலாஸ்காவில் காதலை சந்திக்கிறார்.
క్లోన్డికే గోల్డ్ రష్ సమయంలో తుఫాను, ఆకలితో సహా అనేక కష్టాలను ఎదుర్కొన్న ఒంటరి అన్వేషకుడు, అలాస్కాలో ప్రేమను కనుగొంటాడు.

programme.title: StreetDance 2
स्ट्रीटडांस 2
ஸ்ட்ரீட்டான்ஸ் 2
స్ట్రీట్‌డాన్స్ 2
स्ट्रिटडान्स 2
programme.desc: After an embarrassing defeat, a street dancer, Ash, assembles the best dancers from all across the world for another round against the Invincible crew.
अमेरिकी चालक दल द्वारा अपमानित एक कुशल सड़क नर्तक, ऐश दुनिया के सर्वश्रेष्ठ नर्तकियों की तलाश में बाहर निकलता है। वह फ्रांस में एक नृत्य-प्रतिस्पर्धा में भाग लेने के लिए एक दल को एक साथ लाता है।
ஒரு மோசமான தோல்விக்குபிறகு, இன்வின்சிபல் குழுவுக்கு எதிராக உலகெங்கிலும் உள்ள சிறந்த நடனக் கலைஞர்களை ஒன்றுசேர்க்கும் ஆஷ்.
వీధి నృత్యకారుడు యాష్, ఇన్విన్సిబుల్ సిబ్బందికి వ్యతిరేకంగా ప్రపంచం నలుమూలల నుండి ఉత్తమ నృత్యకారులను ఒకచోట చేర్చుతాడు.
अमेरिकेच्या संघाने ॲशचा अपमान केल्यानंतर ॲश जगभरातील उत्तम नर्तकांचा शोध घेतो.

programme.title: Alex Cross
एलेक्स क्रॉस
ஆலெக்ஸ் க்ராஸ்
అలెక్స్ క్రాస్
अ‍ॅलेक्स क्रॉस
programme.desc: While investigating a murder, Alex Cross learns of a ruthless serial killer. However, things soon spiral out of control, leading him on a quest for revenge and uncovering a dark web of conspiracy.
हत्या की जांच के दौरान, एलेक्स क्रॉस को एक सीरियल किलर का पता चलता है। हालाँकि, जल्द ही चीजें अनियंत्रित होने पर वह बदला ले एक साजिश के काले जाल को उजागर करता है।
கொலையை பற்றி விசாரிக்கையில் தொடர் கொலையாளியைபற்றி கண்டறியும் அலெக்ஸ்,தேடலில் சதித்திட்டத்தின் கும்பலை கண்டுபிடிக்கிறார்.
ఒక హత్యను పరిశోధిస్తున్న అలెక్స్ క్రాస్ క్రూరమైన సీరియల్ కిల్లర్ గురించి తెలుసుకున్నప్పుడు పరిస్థితులు అదుపు తప్పుతాయి.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 2
द हंगर गेम्स: मॉकिंगजे, पार्ट 2
தி ஹங்கர் கேம்ஸ்: மாக்கிங்ஜே, பார்ட் 2
ది హంగర్ గేమ్స్: మోకింగ్‌జయ్, పార్ట్ 2
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen realises that she is no longer fighting for survival. So, she sets out to assassinate the tyrannical President Snow and liberate the people of Panem.
कैटनीस एवरडीन को एहसास होता है कि अब वह ज़िंदा रहने के लिए नहीं लड़ रही है। इसलिए, वह अत्याचारी राष्ट्रपति स्नो की हत्या करके पैनम के लोगों को आज़ाद कराने की ठान लेती है।
உயிர்வாழ்வதற்காக போராடவில்லை என்பதை கட்னிஸ், ஜனாதிபதி ஸ்னோவை படுகொலை செய்து பனேம் மக்களை விடுவிக்க முடிவெடுக்கிறார்.
కాట్నిస్ ఎవర్‌డీన్, నిరంకుశ అధ్యక్షుడు స్నోను హత్య చేసి, పనేమ్ ప్రజలను విముక్తి చేయడానికి బయలుదేరుతుంది.

programme.title: Piranha 3DD
पिरान्हा 3डी
பிரானா 3டி‌டி
పిరాన్హా 3డిడి
programme.desc: The bloodthirsty piranhas head towards a local water park. Amidst the fun-seeking horde at the park are friends Maddy, Barry and Kyle who decide to take on the man-eating creatures.
खून के प्यासे पिरान्हा एक स्थानीय वाटर पार्क की ओर बढ़ते हैं। पार्क में मौज-मस्ती की तलाश में जुटी भीड़ के बीच दोस्त मैडी, बैरी और काइल, आदमखोर जीवों से लड़ने का फैसला करते हैं।
ஒரு நீர் பூங்கா நோக்கி செல்லும் தீய பிரன்ஹாக்களை தடுக்க முயலும் அங்கு வேடிக்கை-தேடும் மேடி, பாரி மற்றும் கைல்.
ముగ్గురు స్నేహితులు మ్యాడీ, బారీ, కైల్‌లు స్థానిక వాటర్ పార్క్ వైపు వస్తున్న రక్తపిపాసి పిరాన్హాలను చంపాలనుకుంటారు.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick
टॉप गन: मेवरिक
டாப் கன்: மேவ்ரிக்
టాప్ గన్: మావెరిక్
टॉप गन: मॅव्हरिक
programme.desc: After 30 years of service, Maverick mentors a troop of elite Top Gun alumni for an esteemed mission while battling his demons from the past.
30 वर्षों की सेवा के बाद, मेवरिक अपने अतीत के संघर्षों से जूझते हुए एक प्रतिष्ठित मिशन के लिए टॉप गन के पूर्व छात्रों की एक विशिष्ट टुकड़ी का मार्गदर्शन करते हैं।
மேவரி கடந்த கால பேய்களுடன் போராடும் அதே வேளையில், டாப் கன் முன்னாள் மாணவர் குழுவை மதிப்புமிக்க பணிக்காக வழிநடத்துகிறார்.
30 సంవత్సరాల సేవ తర్వాత, మావెరిక్ ఉన్నత స్థాయి మిషన్ కు సిద్ధం కావడానికి ఎలైట్ టాప్‌గన్ గ్రాడ్యుయేట్లకు శిక్షణ ఇస్తుంది.

programme.title: Apocalypto
अपोकैलिप्टो
அபோகேலிப்டோ
అపోకలిప్టో
अपोकॅलिप्टो
programme.desc: A mettlesome tribesman must do whatever it takes to protect himself and his family from a multitude of threats during the Mayan civilisation's waning years.
माया सभ्यता के पतन के वर्षों के दौरान एक साहसी आदिवासी खुद को और अपने परिवार को अनेकों खतरों से बचाने के लिए हर संभव प्रयास करता है।
மாயன் நாகரிகத்தின் அழிவின்போது அச்சுறுத்தல்களிலிருந்து தன்னையும் குடும்பத்தையும் பாதுகாக்க முயலும் ஒரு பழங்குடியினர்.
ఒక గిరిజనుడు మయాన్ నాగరికత అంతరించిపోతున్న కాలంలో ఎదురవుతున్న ముప్పుల నుండి తనని, తన కుటుంబాన్ని కాపాడుకోవాలి.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
मिशन: इम्पॉसिबल II
மிஷன்: இம்பாசிபிள் II
మిషన్: ఇంపాజిబుల్ II
मिशन: इम्पॉसिबल
programme.desc: Agent Ethan Hunt fights against a rogue terrorist and rushes to prevent a deadly virus from spreading. To avert a global catastrophe, Ethan has to bring everything to an end.
एजेंट ईथन हंट एक बागी आतंकवादी से लड़ता है और एक जानलेवा वायरस को फैलने से रोकने के लिए तेज़ी से आगे बढ़ता है। एक वैश्विक तबाही को टालने के लिए, ईथन को सब कुछ खत्म करना पड़ता है।
ஏஜென்ட் ஈதன் ஹன்ட் ஒரு முரட்டு பயங்கரவாதிக்கு எதிராகப் போராடுகிறார், மேலும் ஒரு கொடிய வைரஸ் பரவாமல் தடுக்க விரைகிறார்.
ఏజెంట్ ఏతాన్ హంట్ ఒక క్రూర ఉగ్రవాదితో పోరాడుతూ, ప్రాణాంతక వైరస్ వ్యాప్తి చెందకుండా నిరోధించడానికి బయలుదేరతాడు.

programme.title: Maximum Conviction
मॅक्सिमम कन्विक्शन
programme.desc: This is Film - Thriller Category

programme.title: Now You See Me
नाउ यू सी मी
நௌ யூ சீ மீ
నౌ యూ సీ మీ
नाऊ यू सी मी
programme.desc: Four talented magicians are plucked from obscurity to become the Four Horsemen - a group of stage illusionists who soon attract the attention of the FBI.
सड़कों पर प्रदर्शन करने वाले चार जादूगर एक बीमा कंपनी के मालिक की भारी मात्रा में धनराशि चुरा लेते हैं, जबकि पुलिस अधिकारी उनका पीछा कर रहे होते हैं।
ஒரு காப்பீட்டு அதிபருக்குச் சொந்தமான மிகப்பெரிய தொகையை கொள்ளையடித்த நான்கு தெரு மந்திரவாதிகளை பிடிக்க துரத்தும் போலீஸ்.
ఒక ఫెడరల్ ఏజెంట్, ఇంటర్‌పోల్ డిటెక్టివ్ అవినీతిపరులైన వ్యాపార నాయకులను దోచుకునే ఇంద్రజాలికులను పట్టుకోవాలనుకుంటారు.

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
ट्रांसफॉर्मर्स: रिवेंज ऑफ द फॉलेन
ட்ரான்ஸ்ஃபார்மர்ஸ்: ரிவெஞ்ச் ஆஃப் தி ஃபாலன்
ట్రాన్స్ఫార్మర్స్: రివెంజ్ ఆఫ్ ది ఫాలెన్
ट्रान्सफॉर्मर्स: रिव्हेंज ऑफ द फॉलन
programme.desc: Sam and Mikaela once again join forces with Optimus Prime and the Autobots to save Earth from The Fallen, the ruthless robot who teams up with the Decepticons.
सैम और मिकायला एक बार फिर ऑप्टिमस प्राइम और ऑटोबॉट्स के साथ मिलकर पृथ्वी को 'द फॉलन' से बचाने के लिए हाथ मिलाते हैं--एक ऐसा बेरहम रोबोट, जो डिसेप्टिकॉन्स के साथ मिल गया है।
தி ஃபாலனிடமிருந்து பூமியைக் காப்பாற்ற சாமும் மிகேலாவும் மீண்டும் ஆப்டிமஸ் பிரைம் மற்றும் ஆட்டோபாட்களுடன் இணைகிறார்கள்.
ఆటోబాట్‌లను తప్పించుకుంటూ సాధారణ జీవితాన్ని గడిపే సామ్‌ను డిసెప్టికాన్స్ ట్రాన్స్‌ఫార్మర్స్ యుద్ధంలోకి నడిపిస్తారు.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
जुमानजी: वेलकम टू द जंगल
programme.desc: Four teens are transported into a magical jungle game, becoming adult avatars and must navigate challenges to return home safely.
चार छात्र एक जादुई वीडियो गेम खेलते हैं, जो उन्हें जुमानजी की जंगली दुनिया में खींच लाता है और वहाँ वे अपने अवतार के रूप में फंस जाते हैं। वास्तविक दुनिया में लौटने के लिए, उन्हें खेल खत्म करना होगा।

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
टीनएज म्यूटेंट निंजा टर्टल्स: आउट ऑफ़ द शैडोज़
டீன்ஏஜ் ம்யூட்ன்ட் நிஞ்சா டர்டில்ஸ்: அவுட் ஆஃப் தி ஷாடோஸ்
టీనేజ్ మ్యూటెంట్ నింజా టర్టల్స్: ఔట్ ఆఫ్ ది షాడోస్
टीनेज म्युटंट निन्जा टर्टल: आऊट ऑफ द शॅडोज
programme.desc: The turtles team up with their new member, Casey Jones, to take down Shredder, who joins forces with mad scientist Baxter Stockman, Bebop, Rocksteady and Krang.
टर्टल्स अपने नए सदस्य, केसी जोन्स के साथ मिलकर श्रेडर को हराने के लिए एकजुट होते हैं, जो पागल वैज्ञानिक बैक्सटर स्टॉकमेन, बेबॉप, रॉकस्टेडी और क्रैंग के साथ हाथ मिला लेता है।
ஷ்ரெடரையும் பைத்தியக்கார விஞ்ஞானி பாக்ஸ்டர் ஸ்டாக்மேனையும் வீழ்த்த ஆமைகள் கேசி ஜோன்ஸுடன் இணைந்து செயல்படுகின்றன.
తాబేళ్లు, కేసీ జోన్స్‌ కలిసి స్టాక్‌మాన్, బెబోప్, రాక్‌స్టెడీ, క్రాంగ్‌లతో చేతులు కలిగిన ష్రెడర్‌ను ఎదుర్కొంటాయి.

programme.title: The Kid
द किड
தி கிட்
ద కిడ్
द कीड
programme.desc: After a woman abandons her child, the Tramp finds him and takes him under his wing. As the boy grows up, the Tramp and the boy try to cope with life's trials and tribulations.
एक महिला द्वारा अपने बच्चे को छोड़ दिए जाने के बाद, ट्रम्प उसे ढूँढ़ता है और अपने संरक्षण में ले लेता है। जैसे-जैसे लड़का बड़ा होता है, ट्रम्प और लड़का जीवन की कठिनाइयों से निपटने की कोशिश करते हैं।
கைவிடபட்ட ஒரு குழந்தையை நாடோடி வளர்க்கையில், வாழ்வில் பின்னர் இருவரும் சோதனைகள்-இன்னல்களை சமாளிக்க முயலுக்கிறார்கள்.
ఒక స్త్రీ తన బిడ్డను విడిచిపెట్టిన తర్వాత, ట్రాంప్ అతనిని చూసుకుంటాడు. బాలుడు పెరిగేకొద్దీ వారు పరీక్షలను ఎదుర్కొంటారు.

programme.title: Incoming
इनकमिंग
இன்கம்மிங்
ఇన్కమింగ్
इन्कमिंग
programme.desc: Imprisoned at the International Space Station, a group of terrorists manages to escape confinement and take control of the ship. However, their mission to target the Soviets threatens world peace.
आतंकवादियों द्वारा एक अंतरिक्ष स्टेशन पर कब्ज़ा करने के बाद उनका अगला लक्ष्य मास्को शहर है। एक शटल पायलट और एक नया डॉक्टर उन्हें रोकते हैं, जबकि एक दुष्ट सीआईए एजेंट के योजनाओं से यह जटिल हो जाता है।
விண்வெளி நிலையம் மூலம் மாஸ்கோவை தாக்கும் தீவிரவாதிகளை பைலட்டும் மருத்துவரும் தடுக்க, சிக்கலாக்கும் சி‌ஐ‌ஏ முகவர்.
మాస్కోను లక్ష్యంగా చేసుకుని ఒక అంతరిక్ష కేంద్రాన్ని ఆక్రమించుకున్న ఉగ్రవాదులను ఒక షటిల్ పైలట్, ఒక వైద్యుడు అడ్డుకోవాలి.

programme.title: Sabotage
सैबटाज़
சாபடாஜ்
సాబోటేజ్
सॅबोटॅज
programme.desc: John Wharton, the captain of an elite task force, raids a safe house owned by one of the most lethal drug cartels with his team. Though the mission is successful, death awaits them.
जॉन व्हार्टन, एक विशिष्ट टास्क फोर्स के कप्तान, अपनी टीम के साथ ख़तरनाक ड्रग कार्टेल में से एक के स्वामित्व वाले एक घर पर छापा मारते हैं। हालांकि मिशन सफल होता है, लेकिन मौत उनका इंतज़ार कर रही है।
ஜான் வார்டன், தனது குழுவுடன் போதைப்பொருள் கும்பல்களில் ஒருவருக்குச் சொந்தமான ஒரு பாதுகாப்பான வீட்டைத் தாக்குகிறார்.
డ్రగ్ కార్టెల్ యాజమాన్యంలోని సురక్షితమైన ఇంటిపై దాడి చేసిన తర్వాత జాన్ వార్టన్, అతని బృందం ఇబ్బందులను ఎదుర్కొంటారు.

programme.title: No Escape
नो एस्केप
நோ எஸ்கேப்
నో ఎస్కేప్
नो एस्केप
programme.desc: Jack Dwyer and his family move to a country in Southeast Asia. However, a sudden and violent uprising forces them to flee or risk being executed.
जैक ड्वायर और उसका परिवार दक्षिण-पूर्व एशिया के एक देश में चले जाते हैं। हालाँकि, अचानक और हिंसक विद्रोह उन्हें भागने पर मजबूर कर देता है या फिर उन्हें मार दिए जाने का जोखिम उठाना पड़ता है।
குடும்பத்துடன் தென்கிழக்கு ஆசியாவிலுள்ள நாட்டுக்கு போகும் ஜேக், திடீர் வன்முறை எழுச்சி அவர்களை தப்பிஓட வைக்கிறது.
కమాండింగ్ ఆఫీసర్ చంపిన దోషిగా ఒక సైనికుడు తన స్నేహితుల ద్వారా జెట్టిసన్,అపరాధులని ఒక ద్వీపంలో ఉన్న జైలులో వదిలేస్తారు.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie
द लेगो मूवी
த லெகோ மூவி
ది లెగో మూవీ
programme.desc: Emmet, an ordinary individual prophesied to be the Special, is entrusted with the responsibility of saving the Lego world from the cruel ways of Lord Business.
एक साधारण व्यक्ति एम्मेट जिसके बारे में भविष्यवाणी की गई थी कि वह विशेष होगा, उसे लेगो वर्ल्ड को लॉर्ड बिज़नेस के क्रूर तरीकों से बचाने की जिम्मेदारी सौंपी जाती है।
லெகோ உலகத்தை லார்ட் பிசினஸின் கொடூரமான வழிகளில் இருந்து காப்பாற்ற வேண்டிய ஸ்பெஷல் என்று முன்னறிவிக்கப்பட்ட எம்மெட்.
ఒక సాధారణ వ్యక్తి ఎమ్మెట్ కు లార్డ్ బిజినెస్ క్రూరమైన మార్గాల నుండి లెగో ప్రపంచాన్ని రక్షించే బాధ్యతతో అప్పగిస్తారు.

programme.title: Blue Beetle
ब्लू बीटल
ப்ளூ பீட்டல்
బ్లూ బీటిల్
programme.desc: An ancient alien relic chooses a college graduate to be its symbiotic host. As a result, the young man finds himself in possession of a suit with incredible powers.
एक प्राचीन एलियन अवशेष एक कॉलेज ग्रेजुएट को अपना सहजीवी मेज़बान चुनता है। नतीजतन, उस युवक को अविश्वसनीय शक्तियों वाला एक सूट मिल जाता है।
ஒரு அன்னிய நினைவுச்சின்னம் அதன் கூட்டாளியாக தேர்வு செய்த ஒரு கல்லூரி பட்டதாரி அபூர்வ சக்திகளை கொண்ட உடையை பெறுகிறான்.
స్కారాబ్ వద్ద అతీత శక్తులు పొందిన జామీ రేయెస్, దుర్మార్గపు ఉద్దేశాలు కలిగిన వ్యాపారవేత విక్టోరియా కోర్డ్‌తో పోరాడతాడు.

programme.title: 300: Rise of an Empire
300: राइज़ ऑफ़ एन एम्पायर
300: ரைஸ் ஆஃப் அன் எம்பயர்
300 : రైజ్ ఆఫ్ యాన్ ఎంపైర్
300: राईज ऑफ अ‍ॅन एम्पायर
programme.desc: Xerxes, seeking revenge for his father's death, declares war on Greece. As a result, Themistocles, the Athenian admiral, is compelled to form an alliance with Sparta to protect Athens.
पिता की मौत का बदला लेने के लिए जेरेक्सेस के, ग्रीस पर युद्ध की घोषणा करते ही, एथेंस के एडमिरल थेमिस्टोकल्स, मजबूरन स्पार्टा के साथ गठबंधन बनाते हैं।
செர்க்ஸஸ் கிரீஸ் மீது போர் பிரகடனம் செய்ததன் விளைவாக ஏதென்ஸைப் பாதுகாக்க ஸ்பார்டாவுடன் கைகோர்க்கும் தெமிஸ்டோகிள்ஸ்.
తన సైన్యంతో గ్రీస్‌ను జయించటానికి ప్రయత్నించినప్పుడు, థెమిస్టోకిల్స్ మరియు అతని సైన్యం వారిని వ్యతిరేకించాలి.

programme.title: The Lost City
द लॉस्ट सिटी
தி லாஸ்ட் சிட்டி
ది లాస్ట్ సిటీ
द लॉस्ट सिटी
programme.desc: Loretta Sage, a novelist, faces real-life peril when abducted by a billionaire.
जहां लोरेटा सेज के उपन्यास प्राचीन मकबरों और साहसिक कारनामों से भरे होते हैं। वहीं एक सनकी अरबपति के एक पौराणिक खोए हुए शहर का पता लगाने के लिए उनका अपहरण कर लिया जाता है।
ஒரு புகழ்பெற்ற தொலைந்து போன நகரத்தைக் கண்டுபிடிக்க சாகச நாவலாசிரியர் லோரெட்டா சேஜ் ஒரு கோடீஸ்வரரால் கடத்தப்படுகிறார்.
లోరెట్టా సేజ్ నవలలు పురాతన సమాధులు,సాహసోపేతమైన సాహసాలతో నిండి ఉన్నాయి,కానీ ఆమె నిజ జీవితంలో వాటికి సిద్ధంగా ఉందని కాదు.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
रैम्बो: फर्स्ट ब्लड पार्ट 2
ராம்போ: ஃபர்ஸ்ட் ப்ளட் பார்ட் II
రాంబో: ఫస్ట్ బ్లడ్ పార్ట్ 2
programme.desc: John Rambo is offered the chance to cut short his prison tenure by going on a secret mission for the US government deep into the jungles of Vietnam and locating American POWs.
जॉन रेम्बो को अमेरिकी सरकार के लिए वियतनाम के जंगलों में गुप्त मिशन पर जाकर अमेरिकी युद्धबंदियों का पता लगाने के लिए अपनी जेल की अवधि कम करने का मौका दिया जाता है।
வியட்நாமின் காடுகளுக்குள் சென்று அமெரிக்க போர்க் கைதிகளைக் கண்டறிந்து தனது சிறை காலத்தை குறைக்கும் வாய்ப்பை பெறும் ஜான்.
వియత్నాం అడవుల్లో రహస్య మిషన్‌కి వెళ్లి అమెరికన్ యుద్ధ ఖైదీలను గుర్తించడంతో రాంబో తన జైలు శిక్షను తగ్గించుకోగలుగుతాడు.

programme.title: Johnny English Strikes Again
जॉनी इंग्लिश स्ट्राइक्स अगेन
ஜானி இங்க்லீஷ் ஸ்ட்ரைக்ஸ் அகேன்
జానీ ఇంగ్లీష్ స్ట్రైక్స్ ఎగైన్
programme.desc: When a hacker reveals the identities of Britain's undercover agents, British agent Johnny English springs back into action and must overcome the challenges of modern technology.
जब एक हैकर ब्रिटेन के अंडरकवर एजेंटों की पहचान उजागर कर देता है, तो ब्रिटिश एजेंट जॉनी इंग्लिश फिर से एक्शन में आ जाता है और उसे आधुनिक तकनीक की चुनौतियों का सामना करना पड़ता है।
பிரிட்டனிலுள்ள இரகசிய முகவர்களின் அடையாளங்களை வெளிப்படுத்தும் ஹேக்கர் கண்டறிய முயலும் ஜானி, பல சவால்களை கடக்க வேண்டும்.
ప్రభుత్వ సమాచారాన్ని సంగ్రహించి, బ్రిటన్ రహస్య ఏజెంట్ల వివరాలను బయటపెట్టిన హ్యాకర్ ను పట్టుకోవడానికి జానీని నియమిస్తారు.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra
जी.आई. जो: द राइज़ ऑफ कोबरा
ஜி.ஐ. ஜோ: தி ரைஸ் ஆஃப் கோப்ரா
జి.ఐ. జో: ది రైజ్ ఆఫ్ కోబ్రా
जी.आय. जो: द राईज ऑफ कोब्रा
programme.desc: American soldiers Duke and Ripcord survive an attack by arms dealer James McCullen and soon join an elite military team tasked with taking him down for good.
अमेरिकी सैनिक ड्यूक और रिपकॉर्ड हथियार डीलर जेम्स मैककुलन के हमले से बच जाते हैं और जल्द ही उसे हमेशा के लिए खत्म करने के लिए एक विशिष्ट सैन्य दल में शामिल हो जाते हैं।
அமெரிக்க வீரர்கள் டியூக்-ரிப்கார்ட் ஆயுத வியாபாரி ஜேம்ஸ் மெக்கல்லனின் தாக்குதலிலிருந்து தப்பி,இராணுவ குழுவில் இணைந்தனர்.
జేమ్స్ మెక్‌కల్లెన్ చేసిన దాడి నుండి బయటపడిన అమెరికన్ సైనికులు డ్యూక్, రిప్‌కార్డ్ లు ఒక ఉన్నత సైనిక బృందంలో చేరతారు.
अमेरिकन सैनिक ड्यूक आणि रिपकॉर्ड, शस्त्र विक्रेता जेम्स मॅककलनच्या हल्ल्यातून बचावतात आणि एका लष्करी संघात सामील होतात.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
द एंग्री बर्ड्स मूवी
programme.desc: Red, Chuck and Bomb have always been the outcasts within a community of flightless birds on an island. But when mysterious green pigs intrude the island, it is up to them to figure out the reason.
रेड, चक और बॉम्ब हमेशा से एक द्वीप पर उड़ने में असमर्थ पक्षियों के समुदाय में अलग-थलग रहे हैं। लेकिन जब रहस्यमयी हरे सूअर वहाँ पहुँचते हैं, तब उन्हें इसका कारण पता करना होता है।

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
मिशन: इम्पॉसिबल
மிஷன்: இம்பாசிபிள்
మిషన్: ఇంపాజిబుల్
मिशन: इम्पॉसिबल
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt, an elite intelligence agent, is branded a traitor following a disastrous mission in Prague. He recruits a team of operatives to help him retrieve a computer disk that can clear his name.
एक कुशल खुफिया एजेंट ईथन हंट, प्रेग में एक विनाशकारी मिशन के बाद देशद्रोही करार दिया जाता है। बेगुनाही साबित करने हेतु एक कंप्यूटर डिस्क हासिल करने में मदद पाने के लिए वह एक ऑपरेटिव टीम बनाता है।
ஒரு புலனாய்வு முகவரான ஈதன் ஹன்ட், பிராகாவில் ஒரு பேரழிவு தரும் பணியைத் தொடர்ந்து துரோகி என்று முத்திரை குத்தப்படுகிறார்.
అమెరికా స్పెషల్ ఏజెంట్, ఈథన్ హంట్ తన టీమ్‌ని చంపాడనే అభియోగంపై నింద రూపుమాపి, అసలు దొంగను పట్టుకోవడానికి పోరాడతాడు.

సినిమాలలో ఉత్తమమైనది.
दूरदर्शनवरील सर्वोत्तम कार्यक्रम सादर करणे.
